_note: Documented parents (and full/notable siblings) for 15 married-in spouses (1400-1750) that had no parents shown: Richard Woodville, Margaret Beauchamp of Bletsoe, Richard Duke of York, Pope Alexander VI, Anne of Denmark, Frederick V, Henrietta Maria, William II of Orange, Ernest Augustus of Hanover, Anne Hyde, Catherine of Braganza, George of Denmark, Mary of Modena, Sophia Dorothea of Celle, Caroline of Ansbach. Existing spouse referenced by id string; new parents/siblings are SPF_ nodes. Cross-links: George William of Celle (SPF_GEORGEWMCELLE) and Sophie Amalie (SPF_SOPHIEAMALIE) are siblings of Ernest Augustus AND, respectively, father of Sophia Dorothea and mother of George of Denmark, so they are defined once in the Ernest Augustus family and referenced by string elsewhere. 👑 = regnant sovereigns only (consorts get no crown, per house style). Sourced to Wikipedia/standard references.
